item.title: Version 1.4.0
item.description:
What's New in 1.4.0

  • More reliable connections on shared networks — Multiple Hosts can now run on the same local network without conflicts.
  • Better resilience during network hiccups — Prevents false disconnections during brief latency spikes or Mac wake from sleep.
  • Multi-display dimension reporting — Screen dimensions now correctly reported when multi-display capture is active.
  • Fixed a crash when iOS client connected with malformed device name data.
  • Fixed a FlatBuffers parsing crash in debug builds.
